membership.title: Choose a commission
membership.description: Each commission context is isolated. You can only enter commissions where you have an active membership and permissions derived from your role.
membership.emptyDescription: The account has a global commission role, but there is no active assignment to a specific commission.

accessDenied.membershipMessage: You do not have an active membership in the selected commission or the URL points to an invalid commission context.
accessDenied.applicationMessage: You cannot open this application in the selected commission context.

unsupported.title: This commission panel is not available yet
unsupported.inboxDescription: You have an active scout commission membership, but this panel does not yet support the scout application inbox.
unsupported.detailDescription: You have an active scout commission membership, but this panel does not yet support the scout application detail view.

inbox.filtersDescription: Narrow the queue by status, candidate, and recent activity.
inbox.emptyTitle: No applications match the selected filters
inbox.emptyDescription: Try broadening the status scope or clearing the search.

sidebar.title: Permission scope
sidebar.description: Data visibility and workflow actions depend on the active commission role. API remains the source of truth for authorization.

application.candidateDescription: Key profile information for reviewing the case. Profile data remains read-only from the application workspace.
application.profileReadonlyDescription: If the commission wants to refer to the candidate profile, use a general application note or an internal note.
application.applicationDescription: Formal application fields that can be reopened for the candidate after feedback is published.
application.supervisorDescription: Trial supervisor details with inline review actions for specific fields.
application.serviceDescription: Service record, courses, successes, and setbacks. This is the main narrative material for the commission review.
application.attachmentsDescription: Files available to the commission. Feedback can be attached to a specific file.
application.hufcowyDescription: District leader written opinion, if it was attached to the application.
application.hufcowyEmpty: No district leader written opinion was attached.
application.generalAttachmentsDescription: Other general attachments added by the candidate.

requirements.title: Requirement review
requirements.description: Each requirement has its own context, evidence, and review actions. The commission works on a specific item, not on a wall of text.
requirements.noAttachments: No attachments were added to this requirement yet.

candidateFeedback.title: Candidate feedback proposals
candidateFeedback.description: This workspace is for draft feedback proposals attached to fields, requirements, and attachments. The candidate only sees them after the feedback set is published.
candidateFeedback.publishedDescription: This is the locked feedback set already sent to the candidate together with the "Needs Fixing" status.
candidateFeedback.noSummary: No summary message. The candidate will only see annotations attached to specific elements.
candidateFeedback.empty: There is no active candidate feedback.
candidateFeedback.noActiveRequest: There is no active feedback set for this application yet.
candidateFeedback.draftPublishHint: The candidate cannot see these proposals yet. Publishing sends the full set and switches the application to "Needs Fixing".
candidateFeedback.draftMemberHint: The candidate cannot see these proposals yet. They are sent only after the secretary or chairman publishes them.
candidateFeedback.publishedHint: This feedback set has already been sent to the candidate and stays locked until the application is resubmitted.

revisionAudit.title: Candidate fix execution
revisionAudit.description: Comparison between the snapshot captured when feedback was published and the snapshot created after the candidate resubmitted the application.
revisionAudit.empty: There are no closed feedback sets with change audit yet.
revisionAudit.selectionHint: Choose a set from the list to review the candidate's exact changes.
revisionAudit.noSummary: Closed feedback set without a summary message.
revisionAudit.auditUnavailable: A complete before/after audit is not available for this feedback set. This applies to older data created before snapshot links were introduced.

counts.notComparable: {count, plural, one {# not comparable} other {# not comparable}}

notes.title: Commission notes
notes.description: Internal working notes visible only to commission members.
notes.empty: There are no commission notes yet.

annotations.anchorLabel: The annotation will be attached to: {anchor}
annotations.candidateDescription: The candidate cannot see this yet. It becomes visible only after the feedback set is published.
annotations.internalDescription: This note stays internal and never appears in the candidate view.
annotations.bodyPlaceholder: Describe the issue, the requested change, or the commission's working decision.

feedback.title: Candidate feedback
feedback.description: Candidate feedback is created inline on fields, requirements, and attachments. Setting the status to "Needs Fixing" publishes the active feedback draft.

comments.title: Internal comments
comments.description: Commission notes visible only inside the commission panel.
comments.bodyPlaceholder: Add an internal note, question, or working decision for the commission.
comments.empty: There are no internal comments yet.
comments.readOnlyNotice: You do not have permission to add comments, but you can review the commission history.

workflow.title: Status and publishing
workflow.description: The commission works on feedback proposals, while the secretary or chairman publishes the final set and makes status decisions.
workflow.controlDescription: These actions do not publish new feedback for the candidate.
workflow.noActions: This role can review the process, but cannot publish feedback or change statuses.
workflow.fixRequestMessageRequired: Moving to "Needs Fixing" requires a message for the candidate.
workflow.fixRequestScopeRequired: Select at least one field, requirement, or general attachment permission.

feedback.title: Candidate feedback
feedback.none: There is no active feedback set for this application.
feedback.draftReady: {count, plural, one {# proposal is waiting to be sent} other {# proposals are waiting to be sent}}
feedback.memberHint: Commission members can still refine proposals, but they do not publish them on their own.
feedback.publishHint: After publishing, the candidate sees exactly this set of feedback and it stays locked until resubmission.
feedback.publishedHint: The active feedback set has already been sent. New candidate feedback can be prepared only after resubmission.

fixRequest.editorDescription: Save a draft or publish the fix request together with the status change to "Needs Fixing".
fixRequest.messagePlaceholder: Describe what the candidate must update and what the commission expects on resubmission.

timeline.title: Commission timeline
timeline.description: Audit trail for the commission: status changes, published candidate feedback, and key system events.

system.INSTRUCTOR_APPLICATION_SUBMITTED: The application was submitted for commission review.

messages.downloadError: Attachment download failed. Please try again.
messages.annotationSaveError: The annotation could not be saved. Please try again.
messages.commentSaveError: Comment could not be saved. Please try again.
messages.fixRequestSaveError: Fix request draft could not be saved. Please try again.
messages.statusChangeError: Status change failed. Please try again.
